title: RUSTPY-0008 — segfault: subscripting an uninitialized `re.Match` (`_sre` `Match::as_mapping`)
notes: Subscripting an uninitialized re.Match (built via __new__) reads garbage regs/string; the AsMapping subscript path lacks the init guard group()/repr have. SIGSEGV 6/6, deterministic. Reproduced from fusil --new-uninit alone (the mode's protocol-slot hammer on T.__new__(T)). No panic line -> rustpySEGV bucket (gdb resolves to _sre Match::as_mapping).
